NAME: HCHS/SOL
DESCRIPTION: Hispanic Community Health Study / Study of Latinos: four U.S. field centers with deep cardiometabolic phenotyping; central to GWAS in admixed Latino populations.
MANUAL_CITATION: Lavange, L. M., Kalsbeek, W. D., Sorlie, P. D., Avilés-Santa, L. M., Kaplan, R. C., Barnhart, J., ... & Sorlie, P. D. (2010). Sample design and cohort selection in the Hispanic Community Health Study/Study of Latinos. Annals of Epidemiology, 20(9), 642-649.
